name: reposcope-pro
description: RepoScope Pro: Cost (model-agnostic token cost per file), Budget (Token Budget Intelligence — per-prompt context overhead, rules audit with one-click fixes, subscription runway, optimization recommendations), Compliance (OWASP Top 10 / SOC 2 / PCI-DSS posture mapped from your scan — code-level controls, not a certification tool), plus the AI Game Plan with suggested goals. Requires a RepoScope Pro license (Stripe customer id via REPOSCOPE_LICENSE_KEY or a .reposcope-license file).
